docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-28-2008 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LANGER, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT NEVIS, JOHN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-18-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NEVIS, JOHN
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-28-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY LANGER, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT NEVIS, JOHN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LANGER, JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NEVIS, JOHN DEFENDANT APPEARED PERSONALLY AND WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
